mission.title: grpc: Fork support is only compatible with the epoll1 and poll polling strategies
mission.description: Fork support is only compatible with the epoll1 and poll polling strategies. This issue affects 12+ users.

steps.title: Confirm Fork support is only compatible with the epoll1… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: I can't reproduce this on my mac with the latest OS X, and grpcio v1.44.0. On Mac, gRPC defaults to use the `poll` polling engine. I'd be curious if your code worked if you ran the same process with the environment variables `GRPC_POLL_STRATEGY=poll`, which should be redundant on Mac, and `GRPC_VERBOSITY=debug`. The first few lines of output will show you which polling engine you're using.
